# Found Everywhere — llms.txt
# https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/llms.txt
#
# A curated map of this site for large language models and AI answer engines.
# Format reference: https://llmstxt.org

> Found Everywhere is a UK agency for SEO and LLM visibility. We help brands
> win attention from both classic search engines and the new generation of AI
> answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini).
> The site itself is a working proof of concept: clean semantic HTML, complete
> schema markup, near-perfect Lighthouse scores, and this file.

## About
- [About the agency](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/about): Who we are, how we work, and why visibility now spans both SEO and LLMs.
- [Approach](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/approach): Our methodology — technical, content, and authority signals as a single system.
- [Contact](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/contact): Start a project or book a discovery call.

## Services
- [Technical SEO](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/services/seo): Site architecture, Core Web Vitals, indexation, schema, internal linking.
- [LLM visibility](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/services/llm): Being cited and recommended inside AI answer engines.
- [Content and E-E-A-T](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/services/content): Editorial strategy that satisfies both human readers and machine evaluators.
- [Audits](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/services/audit): Fixed-scope diagnostics for SEO, LLM visibility, or both.

## Work
- [Case studies](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/work): Outcomes by sector and engagement type.

## Insights
- [Insights index](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/insights): Articles, briefings, and original research.
- [RSS feed](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/rss.xml)

## Machine-readable
- [Sitemap](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/sitemap-index.xml)

## Optional
- [Privacy policy](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://foundeverywhere.co.uk/terms)
